summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Speakupp Weekly Zoom Class Schedule section. All 6 required features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: Schedule section displays correctly with 4 class cards
Schedule shows correct timings (Mon/Wed/Fri 7 PM IST, Sat 11 AM IST)
Saturday class is marked as Popular with visible badge
Join Zoom Meeting button exists and is clickable
Schedule link in navigation works and scrolls to section
Schedule link in footer works and scrolls to section
Schedule cards display correct topics and durations
Professional styling and layout implemented correctly
